### Scope check

- [ ] This change keeps the extension local-first (no new phone-home endpoints).
- [ ] This change does not require new browser permissions beyond what manifest.json already declares — or I've justified the new permission below.
- [ ] This change does not widen the tool allowlist in `host/native-host.js` — or I've justified the widening below.
